kernel_cfg: KASAN+KCOV+UBSAN+SLUB_DEBUG_ON+LOCKDEP, NF_TABLES=n, IO_URING runtime-disabled, USER_NS unprivileged off
interpretation: Bounded broad cold-start fuzz on a hardened recent LTS with sanitizers ON typically does not surface fresh kernelCTF-eligible CVEs in 30 minutes. Pipeline is end-to-end validated: kernel boots clean, 4 KASAN VMs hit ~100 progs/sec, agent.loop confirmed a positive control (CVE-2024-1086 historical UAF) and correctly returned inconclusive on a no-crash boot dmesg.
